Yeah probably runs but doesn’t have any type of revenue flow that moves back into the token like bnkr does (at least yet)

And most of the time successful launchers have tokens that were launched from that run far past the actual launcher itself

I just like the meme and think there’s room for another cat coin to run it up with Cashcat 

E.g. Solana had multiple dog coins run to billions and others run to hundreds of millions (and a couple cats)

Robinhood cat is the leader atm so who knows but I think this has potential mainly just because I like it and it’s easy to meme lol
